titleStmt.title: SII 4.1120: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1120. (A.R. No. 264 of 1893). ON THE SAME WALL, BETWEEN THE FIRST AND SECOND PILLARS.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[Ā]sī[dvinītō dvijapārijātō nidhi¨rggu]ṇānāṁ bhuvi celviseṭṭiḥ.tatassutōbhūdeṟagassuśīlō dayāparaḥ
paṇḍitapārijātaḥ [. 1*] śakādhipābdēdahanādrikhēṁddumitē tithau kā¨rttikapū¨rṇnimāyāṁ . prādādakhaṇḍaṁ
bhuvanā¨rccitāya bhīmāya dhīmāneṟagaḥ pradīpaṁ [. 2*]Idi Eṟiyanadi . Āsīdvinitō dvijapārijātō
nidhi¨rgguṇānāṁ bhuvi celviseṭṭiḥ . tatassutōbhūdeṟagassuśīlaḥ priyā tadīyābhavadeṟṟakāṁbā [. 3*]tayōssutōbhū
dvinitāmanōbhū¨rnnārāyaṇō vārijapatranētraḥ . yō mānanīyō bhuvi mānavānāmēnō vihīnō
vinayōpapannaḥ [. 4*] śakādhipābdē dahanādrikhēṁddumitē tithau kā¨rttikapū¨rṇnimāyāṁ .nārāyaṇō dīpa
makhaṇḍava¨rttiṁ śrībhīmanāthāya mudādiśatsaḥ [. 5*] Idi nārāyaṇudi . śakava[¨r]ṣa 1073 gunēṇṭi kā¨rtti
kamāsa punnaminaṇḍu śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara kulōttuṁggacōḍagoṁkkarājula talya sūrama kūntuṟu
prōlama śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakaṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍava¨rtti lōhadaṇḍu di 1 vīra tama tallisūramapēraṁ be
ṭṭiṁccina di 2 vīra tama Avva Eṟakamapēraṁ beṭṭi tama tāta Eṟiyamaseṭṭipēraṁ beṭṭina di1 ya vikā
nāvabōlanaṇḍu kāṭabōla paṇḍya bādabōla paṇḍya talarāśi brammaṇḍu talarāśi kāṭaṇḍu Ī dīpa 5 ṇṭilōṁ brōla
kōnabōla dābhayakupaṇḍu surabōla laṇḍu talarāsi dāsiya
Digital edition of SII 4.1120 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
